description.unified: Unleashes an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing Magic Damage to each enemy hit. Damage increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. [(removed) This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.]
Deals Magic Damage 2 time(s) to a random enemy and surrounding enemies, and stuns them for [1sec->1.8 sec]. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

Deals Magic Damage 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for [1sec->1.8 sec], and reduces their Critical Chance by [25%->100%] for 7 sec. Damage increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.

Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing Magic Damage, knocking them back for [0.5sec->1.2 sec], and increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6 sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

light.unified: Ignores the target’s Block effects. [(removed) Damage increases by 50%.]

dark.unified: Stuns enemies hit for [1 sec->1.2 seconds].

light.unified: For 7 seconds, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 200. [(removed) Damage increases by 50%.]

dark.unified: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100%. [(removed) For 7 sec, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 150.]
Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [10%->30%], and damage taken is reduced by [10%->30%].
